about.title: Why Choose LocalHands?
about.subtitle: We take the guesswork out of hiring and offering services by providing tools designed for transparency and trust.
about.gridSection.find.title: 📍 Find Exactly What You Need
about.gridSection.find.description: Browse our interactive map or use powerful search filters to sort providers by distance, rating, and service type so you always find the perfect match right around the corner.
about.gridSection.verified.title: ⭐ 100% Verified Reviews
about.gridSection.verified.description: Trust is everything. We exclusively support verified reviews, meaning users can only leave feedback after a service is fully completed and paid for. No fake reviews.
about.gridSection.communication.title: 💬 Seamless Communication
about.gridSection.communication.descript: Browse detailed provider profiles complete with photos and descriptions, and use our secure in-app messaging to discuss details, scheduling, and pricing.
about.gridSection.secure.title: 🛡️ Built for Peace of Mind
about.gridSection.secure.description: From secure payment processing to a dedicated support team ready to assist buyers and sellers with any disputes, we ensure every transaction is safe and fair.
about.gridSection.accessible.title: 🌍 Accessible to Everyone
about.gridSection.accessible.description: Communities are diverse, and so are we. LocalHands proudly supports multiple languages so everyone can connect without barriers.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.description: Whether you are a skilled professional looking to grow your local business, or a neighbour who just needs an extra set of hands, LocalHands is here to help. We are more than just a marketplace; we are a tool to build stronger, more connected, and reliable communities.

tos.title: Terms of Service
tos.intro.title: 1. Introduction
tos.intro.content: Welcome to LocalHands. By accessing or using our platform, website, or mobile application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to all the terms and conditions, you may not access or use our services. LocalHands provides an online marketplace connecting individuals seeking services ('Buyers') with independent professionals and businesses offering services ('Providers').
tos.accounts.title: 2. User Accounts
tos.accounts.content: To use certain features of the platform, you must register for an account. You agree to provide accurate, complete, and updated information. You are solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. LocalHands reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or provide fraudulent information.
tos.marketplace.title: 3. The LocalHands Marketplace
tos.marketplace.content: LocalHands is a venue. We do not directly provide the services listed on our platform, nor do we employ the Providers. While we strive to maintain a safe and trustworthy community, LocalHands is not responsible for the performance, quality, or safety of the services rendered by Providers. Any contract formed for services is directly between the Buyer and the Provider.
tos.acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable Use
tos.acceptableUse.content: Users agree to use LocalHands for lawful purposes only. You may not use the platform to: (a) engage in fraudulent or illegal activities; (b) harass, abuse, or harm other users; (c) offer services that are illegal, unsafe, or highly regulated without proper licensing; or (d) attempt to bypass our secure communication and payment systems.
tos.payments.title: 5. Payments and Fees
tos.payments.content: All payments for services must be processed securely through the LocalHands platform. LocalHands may charge service fees for the use of the platform, which will be clearly communicated before any transaction is completed. Attempting to pay for services outside of the platform to avoid fees is a violation of these terms and may result in account termination.
tos.reviews.title: 6. Verified Reviews
tos.reviews.content: To maintain trust, LocalHands strictly enforces a verified review system. Only Buyers who have successfully booked, completed, and paid for a service through the platform may leave a review for that Provider. Reviews must be honest, factual, and free from offensive language. LocalHands reserves the right to remove reviews that violate our community guidelines.
tos.liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
tos.liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, LocalHands shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly, resulting from (a) your use of or inability to use the platform; (b) the conduct or services of any Provider; or (c) unauthorized access to your account.
tos.changes.title: 8. Changes to Terms
tos.changes.content: We may modify these Terms at any time. If we make material changes, we will notify you by updating the 'Last Updated' date at the top of these Terms or by sending an email. Your continued use of LocalHands after the changes take effect constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro.title: 1. Introduction
privacy.intro.content: At LocalHands, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our platform or use our services. Please read this privacy policy carefully to understand our views and practices regarding your personal data.
privacy.collection.title: 2. Information We Collect
privacy.collection.content: We may collect information about you in a variety of ways. This includes personal data you provide directly to us (such as your name, email address, phone number, and payment information when registering or booking a service), as well as derivative data automatically collected by our servers (such as your IP address, browser type, and location data to show you nearby services).
privacy.usage.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
privacy.usage.content: Having accurate information about you permits us to provide you with a smooth, efficient, and customized experience. Specifically, we use your data to create and manage your account, process payments, facilitate communication between Buyers and Providers, resolve disputes, and send you important updates regarding the platform.
privacy.sharing.title: 4. Sharing Your Information
privacy.sharing.content: We only share your information with third parties when necessary to provide our services. For example, we share payment data with secure payment processors and may share basic contact information between a Buyer and a Provider once a service is booked. We do not sell your personal data to marketing companies.
privacy.security.title: 5. Data Security
privacy.security.content: We use administrative, technical, and physical security measures to help protect your personal information. While we have taken reasonable steps to secure the personal information you provide to us, please be aware that despite our efforts, no security measures are perfect or impenetrable, and no method of data transmission can be guaranteed against any interception or other type of misuse.
privacy.rights.title: 6. Your Rights
privacy.rights.content: Depending on your location, you may have the right to request access to the personal data we hold about you, request that we correct inaccuracies, or request that we delete your data entirely. You can manage most of your personal data directly through your account settings or by contacting our support team.
